9//
10// This file defines external functions that can be called to explicitly
11// instantiate the region printer.
12//
13//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
14
15#ifndef LLVM_ANALYSIS_REGIONPRINTER_H
16#define LLVM_ANALYSIS_REGIONPRINTER_H
17
18namespace llvm {
19 class FunctionPass;
20 FunctionPass *createRegionViewerPass();
21 FunctionPass *createRegionOnlyViewerPass();
22 FunctionPass *createRegionPrinterPass();
23 FunctionPass *createRegionOnlyPrinterPass();
24} // End llvm namespace
25
26#endif
